channel.title: Blog on Home
channel.description: Recent content in Blog on Home

item.title: Random Stories
item.description: I was given a google mini home, so I named some of my devices like: Bedroom light’s name is Sushi 🍣 My small heater’s name is Banana 🍌 Another bedroom light’s name is BBQ 🍖 My diffuser’s name is Pinky The sleeping light’s name is Toroto So I can say “Hey Google, turn on Sushi” I just added a command to my Google home. Me: “Hey Google, who is the most beautiful girl in the world ?

item.title: Tips
item.description: in Python, it’s a good practice to typecast categorical features to a category dtype because they make the operations on such columns much faster than the object dtype.

item.title: Wanna see my DIY?
item.description: This is where I will show all of the things I made since I came to U.S. The wallet I got a lot of compliments. The chair After spending money buy a desk, I used its box and a duck tap to make a chair. Luckily, it lasts all year. The makeup organizer
